rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals, while Educ. Code §43.065 governs investment objectives and performance evaluation for the permanent school fund. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: develop written investment objectives concerning the investment of the permanent school fund
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §43.065 pertains to PSF investment management and is unaffected by changes to residence homestead exemption amounts.
